case_title: KAREN KWAI CHAN ET AL VS. JOSE MONTENEGRO

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) APPEARING FOR HER HUSBAND: COLMON CHAN FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, KAREN KWAI

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFFS' REQUEST. PLAINTIFF KAREN KWAI CHAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF COLMON CHAN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY HIS WIFE KAREN KWAI CHAN.
